_comment: The curated allowlist of trusted restaurant critics/publications. A spot's `sources` provenance is only allowed to cite an outlet named here — this is the anti-slop guarantee (no Yelp, no Google reviews, no SEO listicles). `trusted` = national/authoritative outlets accepted in every city; `cities` = additional respected local critics/blogs per city key. Matching is case-insensitive and substring-based, so 'Eater NY' clears the 'Eater' entry.
